creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
Hi,

I was just to submit a PR to update misc/libmetalink, and came across
to find this PR.

My patch added some options:
 - choose either expat or libxml2
 - do not require devel/cunit unless it is choosen
   + add regression-test target to run tests easily

The patch is attached.

Regards,
-- 

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  <umq@ueo.co.jp>
